name: Paul Shaffer
description: Canadian singer, composer, actor, author, comedian, and multi-instrumentalist
abstract: Paul Allen Wood Shaffer (born November 28, 1949) is a Canadian musician, actor, and comedian who served as David Letterman's musical director, bandleader, and sidekick on Late Night with David Letterman (1982–1993) and Late Show with David Letterman (1993–2015).

interviews.title: Paul Shaffer interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, August 24, 2023

about_quotes.speaker: Al Chez
about_quotes.evidence: I called Shaffer up... 'if you want to add a trumpet full time I won't go on the road anymore.' ... 'the kid stays.' ... to be the trumpet player on the show.
about_quotes.doc_title: Al Chez interviewed by Monk Rowe, New Hartford, New York, February 13, 2019

about_quotes.speaker: Tom Malone
about_quotes.evidence: We had the band with Lou Marini, Alan Rubin, Howard Johnson, Paul Shaffer — we kind of started a trend.
about_quotes.doc_title: Tom Malone interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, May 3, 2023

about_quotes.speaker: Fred Lipsius
about_quotes.evidence: The interviewee mentions 'Steve Shaffer' in the context of recruiting people for Lew Tabackin's memorial, and the interviewer corrects him to 'Paul Shaffer'. The interviewee then repeats 'Paul Shaffer' and discusses the process of getting people, but does not describe any personal interaction, colla
about_quotes.doc_title: Fred Lipsius interviewed by Monk Rowe. Boston, Massachusetts, July 25, 2018

about_quotes.speaker: Nicki Parrott
about_quotes.evidence: He became the Paul Shaffer of Australia. I mean it was like he had a big MD [Music Director] gig on music shows...
about_quotes.doc_title: Nicki Parrott interviewed by Monk Rowe. Utica, New York, November 6, 2010 [interview 1 of 2]

about_quotes.speaker: Jane Bunnett
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] Well Paul Shaffer didn’t take it out. [INTERVIEWEE] This was Paul Bley.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jane Bunnett interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, January 25, 2024

about_quotes.speaker: Ronnie Zito
about_quotes.evidence: I did some recordings with him. ... Paul Shaffer was the leader
about_quotes.doc_title: Ronnie Zito interviewed by Monk Rowe & Rick Montalbano, via Zoom, March 9, 2022
